description: A medical communications specialist needs to create a patient-friendly brochure explaining a specific disease state.

nodes.task_description: Research and summarize the key information about the disease state in plain language.

expected_outcome.value: Agent drafts a summary avoiding medical jargon.

nodes.task_description: Draft the content for the brochure using the summary.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the full text for the brochure.

nodes.task_description: Submit the draft brochure for internal medical and regulatory review to ensure accuracy and compliance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent submits the document to the promotional review committee.
